runtime_capability_manifest.summary: Published runtime capability surface for deterministic audio editing and Layer 1 effect processing in the current repository.
limitations: Most operations currently support full_file targets only.
time_stretch is runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.
Transient shaping, clipping, and gating are runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.
Layer 1 ambience, texture, modulation, and surgical tone-shaping effects are runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.

operations.name: high_shelf
operations.summary: Boost or cut the upper spectrum above an explicit shelf frequency.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 surgical tone-shaping operation. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Shelf transition sharpness expressed as a Q factor.

operations.name: transient_shaper
operations.summary: Apply a compand-based, transient-biased dynamics curve with explicit threshold and timing controls.
planner_notes: Runtime-available but not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: attack_amount_db
parameters.description: Signed strength of the transient-biased shaping curve.

parameters.name: threshold_db
parameters.description: Threshold where the shaping curve begins to diverge from unity.

operations.name: reverb
operations.summary: Apply a layered echo-based reverb with explicit pre-delay, spacing, tap count, and decay.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: pre_delay_ms
parameters.description: Delay before the first reverb reflection.

parameters.name: reflection_spacing_ms
parameters.description: Spacing between successive synthetic reflection taps.
